email:
**Subject: Payment Reminder for Outstanding Invoice INV001**

Dear Rajesh Pvt Ltd Team,

We hope this email finds you well. We are writing to follow up on the outstanding payment for our invoice INV001, which was due on [Due Date]. As per our records, the amount of ₹45,000 is now 7 days past the due date.

We understand that unforeseen circumstances can arise, and we are more than happy to work with you to find a suitable solution. However, we kindly request that you settle this outstanding amount at your earliest convenience.

Please find the invoice details below for your reference:

- Invoice Number: INV001
- Amount Due: ₹45,000
- Due Date: [Due Date]

If you have already made the payment, please disregard this email. If you require any assistance or have questions regarding the invoice, please do not hesitate to contact us.

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter, and we look forward to resolving this issue amicably.

Best regards,
Finance Team
Travel Corporation India (TCI)

1. Subject: Overdue Payment Reminder - INV002

Dear Kapoor Enterprises,

We are writing to bring to your attention that your payment for Invoice INV002 is now 12 days past due. The total amount due is ₹78,000. We understand that unforeseen circumstances may have caused the delay, and we would like to request your prompt attention to settle this outstanding balance.

Please find the invoice details below for your reference:

Invoice Number: INV002
Amount Due: ₹78,000
Due Date: [Original Due Date]

We kindly request that you make the payment at your earliest convenience to avoid any further action. If you have already made the payment, please disregard this email and accept our apologies for any inconvenience caused.

You can make the payment through our bank details or online payment options available on our website. For any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Finance Team
Travel Corporation India (TCI)

subject: Overdue Payment for Invoice INV001 - Payment Request
body:
Dear Rajesh Pvt Ltd Team,

We hope this email finds you well. We are reaching out from the Finance Team at Travel Corporation India (TCI) regarding an outstanding payment for your recent booking. As per our records, you have an overdue invoice (INV001) with a total amount due of ₹45,000.

The invoice details are as follows:

- Invoice Number: INV001
- Amount Due: ₹45,000
- Due Date: [Insert Date, 7 days ago]

We understand that unforeseen circumstances may have caused the delay, and we would like to request your prompt attention to settle this outstanding amount. Your timely payment will help us maintain a smooth relationship and ensure that we can continue to provide you with excellent services.

Please find the payment options below:

- Online Payment: [Insert Online Payment Link]

If you have already made the payment, please disregard this email. However, if you require any assistance or have questions regarding the invoice, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter, and we look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

Travel Corporation India (TCI)

subject: Overdue Payment Reminder for Invoice INV001
body:
Dear Rajesh Pvt Ltd,

We are writing to bring to your attention that your invoice INV001, dated 15th February 2024, remains unpaid. As per our records, the amount due is ₹45,000 and it has been 8 days since the payment was due.

We understand that unforeseen circumstances may have caused the delay, and we would appreciate it if you could settle this outstanding amount at your earliest convenience. Your prompt attention to this matter will help us avoid any further action.

To facilitate a smooth payment process, please find the invoice details below:

Invoice Number: INV001
Invoice Date: 15th February 2024
Amount Due: ₹45,000

If you have already made the payment, please disregard this email. However, if there are any issues or concerns regarding the invoice, kindly contact us at your earliest convenience.

We appreciate your cooperation and look forward to receiving the payment soon.

Best regards,
Finance Team
Travel Corporation India (TCI)
